title: Scout carryforward candidate filter uses bare `git merge-tree` (reports clean on real conflicts) — mis-selects already-superseded orphan branches, wasting operator-prioritized rebase cycles; use a real cherry-pick dry-run + functional-duplicate screen
summary: VERIFIED live 2026-07-14 by the cycle-826 auditor (Opus, independent re-run). On the merge-rung0 lane the scout selected orphan carryforward branches cd409fed (cycle-704) and b270ee11 (cycle-600) as landable, using a bare `git merge-tree` that reported clean. The auditor's real 3-way `git cherry-pick --no-commit` dry-run produced 6 conflict indicators (36 markers), and `git merge-base --is-ancestor 85729a72 main` proved cd409fed's work was ALREADY re-landed on main via cycle-769 (same goal 6588b51f); b270ee11 is an orphan under a DIFFERENT goal (805f6ced). Net: builder correctly made zero change (honored fail-closed AC), cycle produced zero deliverable => WARN->FAIL, one operator-prioritized rebase cycle wasted. This is why merge-rung0 intermittently no-ops/FAILs even though it PASSES when the scout instead builds the actual composition-verdict mechanism. ROOT CAUSE: `git merge-tree` (non-3-way, no index) is not a merge-conflict oracle; and there is no functional-duplicate screen so already-landed orphan work looks pending. FIX (two parts, per auditor recommendation): (1) Scout/triage carryforward-candidate filter MUST use a real `git cherry-pick --no-commit` dry-run + `git diff --check` (or `git merge-tree --write-tree` with conflict parsing) — reject on any conflict; AND reject candidates whose diff is already reachable on main (compare the orphan's `merge-base..tip` patch-id / functional diff against `merge-base..main`; `git merge-base --is-ancestor` for exact supersession). (2) Add a `prune-superseded-orphans` housekeeping lane that walks orphan `cycle-*` refs, flags functional-duplicate landings, and prunes stale refs per verify_remote_pr_before_branch_delete (checks remote + open PR before delete). Deterministic, zero-LLM for the screen. NOT a release blocker; it wastes lanes on the exact rebase backlog the operator prioritized.
acceptance: RED: TestCarryforwardFilter_RealCherryPickRejectsConflict (bare merge-tree-clean but real cherry-pick conflicts => candidate rejected, not selected)
RED: TestCarryforwardFilter_SupersededOrphanRejected (orphan whose diff is already ancestor/functional-dup of main => rejected)
RED: TestPruneSupersededOrphans_FunctionalDuplicateFlagged (orphan re-landed under same goal => flagged; different-goal orphan => left alone)
a merge-rung0-class carryforward cycle no longer selects an already-landed orphan; go test -race PASS; apicover clean
source: cycle-826 audit (Opus) 2026-07-14: independent cherry-pick dry-run refuted scout merge-tree-clean premise (6 conflicts); cd409fed already re-landed via cycle-769
